description: AI-powered clinical voice assistant that generates clinical notes from patient encounters. Reduces documentation burden for physicians. Ambient clinical intelligence that listens to patient visits and creates structured clinical documentation.
business_model: B2B - AI assistant to healthcare providers
key_investors: March Capital, Venrock, Flare Capital, Breyer Capital
competitive_advantage: 75% documentation time reduction, EHR-embedded, specialty-specific models

varden_fit.rationale: Clinical documentation automation - could integrate with occupational health encounters
